content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Implemented the remaining selecting-state remediation in `src/contexts/milestone_record/controller.rs` and `src/cli/run.rs`. `sync_controller_state` now records same-state reason changes as journaled controller events instead of silently checkpointing them, which preserves the post-reconciliation and post-sync selecting audit trail for both fresh `bv --robot-next` requests and pre-fetched recommendation validation. I also normalized restart-time ready checks to use the same qualified/unqualified bead-id matching as the main selector, so `resume_controller` no longer misclassifies mixed-form `br ready` results as unready work.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Added same-state controller sync handling that preserves active context, appends a transition journal entry when the reason changes, updates the persisted controller snapshot, and validates same-state journal entries during hydration.
2. [Completed] Updated `ProjectMilestoneControllerRuntime::has_ready_beads` to reuse milestone bead-id canonicalization so restart-time readiness checks match the selector's qualified/unqualified bead-id behavior.
3. [Completed] Added regression coverage for same-state selecting audit entries on both selection paths and for blocked-controller resume with mixed-form ready bead ids, then formatted the code.
4. [Completed] Ran targeted and full library validation to confirm the controller audit-trail and restart-time readiness fixes do not regress existing behavior.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo fmt --all` passed.
- `cargo test --lib sync_controller_state_records_same_state_reason_updates -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test --lib milestone_controller_ready_check_matches_explicit_planned_bead_ids -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test --lib select_next_milestone_bead_ -- --nocapture` passed (11 tests).
- `cargo test --lib resume_blocked_controller_matches_mixed_form_ready_bead_ids -- --nocapture` passed.
- `cargo test --lib` passed (649 tests).

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
